wordplay_note: Woman connected to the VALIS satellite's network of agents
card_description: Sadassa Silvia is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Radio Free Albemuth*. Friend of Nicholas who is part of the secret Christian resistance. Name note: Woman connected to the VALIS satellite's network of agents. The underground church surviving beneath totalitarianism. First appears in *Radio Free Albemuth*.

reference.brief: Friend of Nicholas who is part of the secret Christian resistance
reference.significance: The underground church surviving beneath totalitarianism
